---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the problem or limitation you're running into. What can't you do today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see added or changed?

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Links, examples, mockups, or anything else that helps explain the idea.
